queries.question: List all people who have ever lost property and also list customers who filed complaints on January 5, 2024.
queries.sql:
SELECT Lost_Property.Owner as FullName
FROM Lost_Property
UNION
SELECT Customer_Complaints.CustomerName as FullName
FROM Customer_Complaints
WHERE Customer_Complaints.Date = "January 5, 2024"

queries.question: Who lost something or wrote a complaint on January 5, 2024?
queries.sql:
SELECT Lost_Property.Owner as FullName
FROM Lost_Property
WHERE Lost_Property.Date = "January 5, 2024"
UNION
SELECT Customer_Complaints.CustomerName as FullName
FROM Customer_Complaints
WHERE Customer_Complaints.Date = "January 5, 2024"
